THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HOUSING AUTHORITY OF THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, A PUBLIC CORPORATION RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MIXON, RHODEMA THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 2498 GRIFFITH STREET, SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94124 $4,152.04 RENT, $105.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,257.04, LEASE FORFEITED
